case_title: VUKSICH, PAUL MICHAEL VS SHELTS ROBERT L. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,759.70 FILED BY VUKSICH, PAUL MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHELTS ROBERT L. ALLEN, DICKSIE LYNN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
